keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: List of search keywords. Each is searched separately and results are merged.

location.title: Location
location.description: Careerjet location filter. Empty / 'All Australia' searches AU-wide.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum total listings across all keywords.

maxPages.title: Max Pages per keyword
maxPages.description: Hard cap on listing pages fetched per keyword.

fetchJDs.title: Fetch full job descriptions
fetchJDs.description: When true, also fetch each /jobad/<hash> page for the full description (slower, more proxy traffic).

jdCap.title: Full-JD fetch cap
jdCap.description: Maximum number of full-JD pages to fetch per run (only used when fetchJDs is true).
